title: Collaborative Purchasing of Goods
description: Master's Thesis: Game theory and mechanism design for collaborative purchasing of goods using GHG Protocol Scope 3 emissions rules. Develops VCG-based auction mechanisms for multi-buyer environmental attribute procurement.

title: CANOPI Grid Strategy Platform
description: Web-based grid strategy planning platform for energy asset developers. Features interactive Mapbox maps, n-1 contingency analysis, and real-time scenario planning powered by the CANOPI optimization algorithm for renewable energy siting.

title: ClimateDigest
description: Mobile and web app for researching climate and energy impacts with AI-powered insights. Built with Next.js and Claude AI, with native iOS support via Capacitor.

title: SAF Multi-Category Auction
description: Multiple Category Vickrey Auction system for Sustainable Aviation Fuel procurement. Implements DSIC properties, aggregate reserve pricing, real-time monitoring, and PDF export for supply chain cost-sharing.

title: World History Map
description: Interactive animated world map visualizing 3,000 years of political history. Features smooth territorial transitions, an epoch timeline slider, and AI-generated historical narratives powered by Claude.

title: LCA Taxonomy Builder
description: Life Cycle Assessment taxonomy builder integrating Ecoinvent, USLCI, BAFU, Exiobase, and GABI databases. Features interactive tree construction, fuzzy cross-database mapping, and import/export.

title: Interconnection Queue Simulation
description: Game-theoretic simulation engine for electrical grid interconnection queue analysis. Uses Monte Carlo methods, Nash equilibrium computation, and interactive Streamlit dashboards.

title: Sky's Big Green Flight
description: Interactive children's storybook about Sustainable Aviation Fuel and green aviation. Features animated parchment-styled pages with a responsive, touch-friendly narrative experience.

title: Climate Job Scanner
description: Automated scraper targeting climate and energy investing companies, delivering daily HTML email reports. Scrapes Crunchbase, climate job boards, and investor career pages.

title: SAF Network Optimization
description: Custom solver and optimization model for sustainable aviation fuel distribution and consumption across airline networks.

title: Aviation Noise Impact on Boston
description: Interactive scrollytelling study of how noise from Boston Logan Airport propagates across neighborhoods in Boston and Cambridge.

title: SAF Production Siting
description: Gurobi + Julia optimization model for SAF production facility placement in the US, minimizing costs while meeting demand and feedstock supply constraints.

title: D&D Homebrew Toolkit
description: Web app for creating and managing custom Dungeons & Dragons homebrew content with Firebase-backed persistent storage.

title: Climate Tech Project Financing
description: In Progress: Framework for financing climate tech projects using public-private funding combinations, optimizing strategies by project size, location, and technology type.
